1811490.name: Rouge Patrol
1811490.description:
Part narrative driven RPG part visual novel, your choices and stats will combine to drive the story of Rouge Patrol towards tragedy or victory... such as it exists.

Description


What are little girls made of?
Guts! Grit!
The devil's own spit!
That's what little girls are made of!

Welcome to the Palette War, an unwinnable and unending conflict between Rouge and Bleue.

With all else spent - and surrender unthinkable - the grinding machine of war has now turned to girls. As Sgt P.G. Tails, you will prepare and lead a unit of fellow Rouge soldiers into the fight. Guide her actions. Balance a sergeant’s duties with forming relationships. Seek vengeance for the past or protect your squad in the present. The choice is yours.

Features

  • Eleven main characters and multiple side characters, all with over thirty unique poses
  • Separate health, morale, discipline and relationship systems that impact character appearance and bring the story to life
  • Full HD CGs, backgrounds, sprites and animations
  • Four branching romances and eleven friendships
  • Every character fully voiced
  • Manage stats individually for the whole patrol
  • Levels, exp, ability tests, perks and all that good stuff
  • Found family and tragic friendships!
